presence_results.note_evidence: profound fatigue and deconditioning — by the end of the hospitalization she could not manage short household distances on her feet

presence_results.note_evidence: disturbs sleep on bad nights
worst with prolonged standing ... Stands only with support ... guarded, slow position changes

presence_results.note_evidence: Started naproxen sodium 220 mg tablets for baseline pain control
She lives alone with minimal social contact; her sister died two years ago, and a neighbor provides her only regular help
presence_results.rationale: Living alone, sister's death, neighbor help documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: remote abusive marriage that she left; the former partner has no current presence in her life and she reports no present safety concerns
presence_results.rationale: Safety screen with no current threat documented.

Social work to arrange home supports before discharge and to connect her with community or senior-center programs

presence_results.note_evidence: Dietitian consultation for texture-modified, protein- and calcium-forward meals balanced for glucose and lipids
presence_results.rationale: Dietitian referral with specified diet documented.
